
::: {.callout-tip}
## Sync your Git Repository

At the beginning of each practical, make sure to sync any changes in the main copy of online repository from GitHub.

1. Open RStudio
2. Choose `File` > `Open Project`
3. Navigate to your **`{{< meta course-title >}}_Students_{{< meta intake >}}`** folder and then to the directory for **`{{< meta practical >}}`**, then load **`{{< meta practical >}}.Rproj`**.
4. In a web browser, log in to GitHub and navigate to your fork of the MB1A_Students repository.
5. Click on `Sync Fork`. If it shows "This branch is not behind the upstream" there is nothing else you need to do.
7. Otherwise, click `Update Branch`. **Do not** click `Discard commits`.
8. Go to your RStudio session and open the `Git` tab.
9. Click `Pull` to update your local copy of the repository.

:::
